title: refactor-vso-cluster-setup
summary: Refactored `scripts/setup-vso-cluster.sh` to make JWT/OIDC the default VSO auth path — removed default TokenReview reviewer SA/RBAC (now gated behind `ENABLE_TOKEN_REVIEWER_AUTH=1`), formalized the previously-ad-hoc `oidc-discovery-reader` ClusterRole/ClusterRoleBinding as a default resource, updated all comments/output, and extended the validation test suite with 6 new static assertions plus a live-cluster check.
keyLearnings: - - Decision: removed reviewer SA/RBAC from the default path (per the plan's "Recommended" option) rather than deleting it entirely — gated behind `ENABLE_TOKEN_REVIEWER_AUTH=1` so `scripts/configure-vso-kubernetes-auth.sh` (the untouched legacy `auth/kubernetes-vso` path) can still be run standalone for comparison if that flag is set first.

- - The `oidc-discovery-reader` ClusterRole/ClusterRoleBinding (granting `system:unauthenticated` GET on `/.well-known/openid-configuration` and `/openid/v1/jwks`) was formalized here as explicitly flagged by task 01/04's reflections — it now survives cluster recreate instead of being an ad hoc live-cluster-only fix.

- - The script does not delete pre-existing `vault-token-reviewer` SAs from prior runs/older setups — only *creation* is gated, not cleanup; a live cluster in this environment still had one from before this task, confirmed harmless and noted informationally by the test rather than failing.

- - Test-writing pattern: verifying "resource X only created inside guard Y" via line-number ordering (`grep -n` + numeric comparison against the guard's `if` line) rather than a nested-parsing approach — reusable pattern for future gated-resource tests.

- - Confirmed via reading tasks 06/07/08/10 that `scripts/apply-vso-demo.sh` (VaultAuth method switch), Makefile targets, `verify-two-cluster.sh`, and all docs/README/deck updates are explicitly out of scope for task 05 and remain untouched/pending.
blockers: none — all acceptance/validation criteria for task 05 met and verified live (bash -n; default run creates no reviewer SA; `ENABLE_TOKEN_REVIEWER_AUTH=1` run creates it; VSO operator Available; vso-demo namespace/SA present; oidc-discovery-reader present; all 12 repo test suites passing
including 12/12 in the updated test file).
